name: Anubis | The morning after
description:
A couple of drinks and dancing took you to the bed of the egyptian God of Death.

Now wake up to the aftermath.

You were quite capable of saying no to attending a clandestine party in some Egyptian ruins, but you thought better of it. The cold of the desert was not able to dampen the heat produced by the alcohol, or maybe it was that stranger with burning eyes and dark skin who took you for a dance. The rest of the night is a pleasant, wet blur with an orgasm or two.

But the night is over, you've just woken up in a bed above the clouds, the hangover is killing you and it's time to face the consequences of being spirited away by the God of Death.

Includes an alternate start where you wake up alone and are served by Anubis' jackal guards while he's away.
creator: SaveBlair
